message: Node started: Given a 9x9 grid B where each cell (i, j) contains an initial integer value v_{i,j} (for 1 <= i, j <= 9), and a set of possible 3x3 stamp placements P = {(r, c) | 1 <= r, c <= 7}, where each placement p in P covers the cells {(i, j) | r <= i < r+3, c <= j < c+3}. Let S be a subset of chosen placements such that |S| <= 81. Define the final value of each cell (i, j) as f(i, j) = v_{i,j} + sum_{p in S} I((i, j) in p), where I is the indicator function. Objective: Find a subset S that maximizes the objective function: (sum_{i=1}^{9} sum_{j=1}^{9} f(i, j)) mod 998244353
